title: Reincarnation of the Online Game Addict ~ I Can’t Use the Overpowered Fists That Made Me the Fist King, so Now I Swing a Club for Eight Hours a Day
description:
"The long-awaited comic adaptation of the 8th Web Novel Grand Prize winner!"
Kazuya Sato dominated a VRMMORPG as its strongest player under the name “Fist King,” but then he gets reincarnated into the game world!
In a world dominated by heavy firearms, he aims to become the strongest once again using only his fists—the most powerful analog weapon—leveraging the game knowledge only he possesses!
An online game addict's fantasy.
author: Akikazu
